ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., conceptual, physically-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "lag" INTEGER /* Lag value */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch value */,
  "cell" INTEGER /* Cell value */,
  "rmse" REAL /* RMSE value */,
  "mae" REAL /* MAE value */,
  "r2" REAL /* R2 value */,
  "cc" REAL /* CC value */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias value */,
  "kge" REAL /* KGE value */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the performance metric */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last updated */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario or experiment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the type */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the type was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the access log */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model was run */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the result */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the result was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the input belongs to */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the input */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the input was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the input was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or comments about the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or owner of the parameter */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
